It is the patroness of Belarus.
KnownAs: It is known as the Budslau icon of the Mother of God.
KnownFor: It is known for miraculous healings.
LocatedIn: It is located within the Basilica of the Our Lady of Assumption in the village of Budslau, Belarus.
ManufacturedBy: It was manufactured by an unknown artisan.

UsedFor: It is used for honoring conversion from Calvinism into Roman Catholicism.
